scope_reframe_2026_04_29: User clarified Vercel is preview-only sandbox while building. Custom production domain does not exist yet. Per DEC-020 reframe: T-29 (Vercel manual-promote toggle) and T-32 (first manual production promote) are deferred to Pre-Launch (PL-01..PL-03 in ROADMAP.md). T-34 success criteria are split: SC#3 (Sentry P1 → Telegram) + Lighthouse + axe verifiable now against *.vercel.app preview; SC#1 (manual-promote enforced) deferred. Phase 0 closes when Sentry verify + Lighthouse/axe on preview URL pass.

decisions.decision: Drizzle pulled forward from T-13 to Wave 0 T-09
decisions.rationale: tests/setup/pg-container.ts imports drizzle-orm; without it, Wave 0 tsc gate fails

decisions.decision: tests/e2e/** excluded from react-hooks/rules-of-hooks ESLint rule
decisions.rationale: Playwright fixture's `use` parameter is misidentified as a React hook (false positive)

decisions.decision: Vitest poolOptions removed (Vitest 4 typedefs reject top-level placement; singleFork=false is default)
decisions.rationale: Vitest 4 deprecation; behavior preserved via default

decisions.decision: Cookie banner e2e test marked test.skip with documented reason
decisions.rationale: vanilla-cookieconsent v3 only shows banner when >=1 category is non-readOnly; Phase 0 ships only readOnly necessary by design

decisions.decision: Cloud setup automated via Vercel MCP + Vercel/gh CLI
decisions.rationale: User chose MCP/CLI-automated path over manual UI flow; cuts Wave 1a + Wave 2 human-action time

decisions.decision: BETTER_AUTH_URL set to https://cultural-layer-recklinghausen.vercel.app for production (preview deferred until GH connection — now done)
decisions.rationale: Vercel project URL pattern; will be domain-bound at Pre-Launch

decisions.decision: T-27 verify step skipped (code shipped, live round-trip deferred)
decisions.rationale: Sentry DSN requires user to register at sentry.io first; withSentryConfig wired and typechecks green

decisions.decision: hideSourceMaps removed from SentryBuildOptions (not in v10.50.0 API)
decisions.rationale: @sentry/nextjs 10.50.0 SentryBuildOptions no longer has hideSourceMaps; widenClientFileUpload kept

decisions.decision: tests/e2e excluded from vitest runner via vitest.config.ts exclude pattern
decisions.rationale: Pre-existing bug: Playwright specs were being picked up by vitest, causing runtime error. Rule 1 auto-fix.
Vercel CLI emits KEY="value" format; load-env.ts was not stripping quotes, causing ZodError. Rule 1 auto-fix.

decisions.decision: GitHub repo created as private then switched to public to unlock free-tier branch protection (no secrets in tree, .env.local always gitignored)
decisions.rationale: GitHub Free does not allow branch protection or rulesets on private repos; making public was lowest-friction path. Repo URL: https://github.com/Jole1302/cultural-layer-recklinghausen

decisions.decision: vercel git connect ran via CLI (no browser needed)
decisions.rationale: Vercel CLI 52 supports git connect — bypassed the .continue-here.md note about UI-only step

decisions.decision: T-29 (Vercel deployment-protection toggle) + T-32 (first manual production promote) deferred to Pre-Launch (PL-01..PL-03)
decisions.rationale: User clarified production = preview = *.vercel.app while building; manual-promote toggle is meaningless without a custom domain. Reframed in PROJECT.md DEC-020 + REQUIREMENTS.md REQ-quality-bar + ROADMAP.md ## Pre-Launch Tasks (2026-04-29)
